title: Desert Temple Loot
quickAnswer: Desert temples are usually worth looting early because they are safe to clear if you disarm the TNT trap first and can contain strong starter loot.
keyFacts: Typical prizes include diamonds, emeralds, golden apples, gunpowder, bones, and enchanted books.
The main danger is the pressure-plate TNT trap beneath the central floor.
Early-game value is high because the risk is low compared with deeper hostile structures.
commonMistakes: Digging straight onto the pressure plate and blowing up the loot room.
Overvaluing the structure later when better loot sources are available.
